title: When did the Strings rehearsal in Death take place
display_title: When did the Strings rehearsal in Death take place
wikitext:
[]: When did the Strings rehearsal in Death take place?             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Sep 09, 2010 12:28 pm Is it some kind of narrative technique? Did it even actually happen?

[]: Re: When did the Strings rehearsal in Death take place?             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Sep 09, 2010 12:48 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: Is it some kind of narrative technique? Did it even actually happen?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Sep 09, 2010 12:53 pm It never "happened" lolmetafictionz XDDDDD

[]: Re: When did the Strings rehearsal in Death take place?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 09, 2010 1:12 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: Is it some kind of narrative technique?

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Sep 09, 2010 1:18 pm Xard wrote: lolmetafictionz XDDDDD

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Sep 09, 2010 1:34 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: Lay off the 4chan-sarcasm, brah. It´s not funny.

[]:             Quote Post by Oz » Thu Sep 09, 2010 1:34 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: Lay off the 4chan-sarcasm, brah. It´s not funny.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 09, 2010 1:42 pm Also, ignore what the DVD commentary says about it "actually being in continuity". It's bumpkis.

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Thu Sep 09, 2010 1:48 pm With the stage setting, lack of lighting, and metal folding chairs, I got the impression that it was supposed to be sort of an extention of the Instrumentality sequences from EoTV eps 25 & 26.

[]:             Quote Post by COACH » Thu Sep 09, 2010 2:09 pm BC Baron wrote: With the stage setting, lack of lighting, and metal folding chairs, I got the impression that it was supposed to be sort of an extention of the Instrumentality sequences from EoTV eps 25 & 26.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Sep 09, 2010 2:17 pm Xard wrote: b) secondly 4chan hates XDDDDDD

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Sep 09, 2010 2:20 pm I thought it happened while they were waiting to perform episode 27.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 09, 2010 2:46 pm BC Baron wrote: With the stage setting, lack of lighting, and metal folding chairs, I got the impression that it was supposed to be sort of an extention of the Instrumentality sequences from EoTV eps 25 & 26.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Sep 09, 2010 2:53 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: You mean this?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Sep 09, 2010 3:09 pm Xard wrote: It never "happened" lolmetafictionz XDDDDD

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Sep 09, 2010 3:17 pm Anno's basement.
